scripts.i-all: lerna link && lerna exec npm install
scripts.publish: pnpm run prepublishOnly2  && lerna publish --force-publish=pro/plus-core --conventional-commits && pnpm run afterpublishOnly
scripts.afterpublishOnly: pnpm run copylogs && time /t >trigger/build.trigger && git add ./trigger/build.trigger && git commit -m "build: trigger build image" && TIMEOUT /T 10 && pnpm run commitAll
scripts.commitAll: git add . && git commit -m "build: publish" && git push && pnpm run commitPro
scripts.commitPro: cd ./packages/pro/ && git add . && git commit -m "build: publish" && git push
scripts.prepublishOnly1: pnpm run check && lerna run build
scripts.prepublishOnly2: pnpm run check && pnpm run before-build && lerna run build && pnpm run plugin-doc-gen
scripts.before-build: pnpm run transform-sql && cd ./packages/core/basic && time /t >build.md && git add ./build.md && git commit -m "build: prepare to build"
scripts.docs:build: pnpm run copylogs && vitepress build docs
scripts.release: time /t >trigger/release.trigger && git add trigger/release.trigger && git commit -m "build: release" && git push
